channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How Two Indie Darlings Are Challenging a Collapsing Industry With Their Next Game
item.description: 'Prove You're Human,' from the developers behind '1000xResist' and 'Slay the Princess,' is a surreal interrogation of an AI that thinks she's human.

item.title: Today I learned what a social media bot farm looks like — and it made me delete my Reddit account
item.description: I've been a Reddit user for 13 years — and one video of a social media bot farm was all it took for me to delete my account.

item.title: Indie game Neverway will launch this October, just in time for spooky season
item.description: Indie game studio Coldblood announced today that its debut project Neverway has been given a release window of October 2026. Billed as "nightmarish life-sim RPG," this is going right to the top of my spooky season game queue. It has a cozy-sounding premise, with protagonist Fiona starting a new life on an island, but things take a surreal turn when she becomes the immortal herald for a dead god. She'll be building relationships and making friends one minute and coping with psychological horrors the next. This game has been on our radar since it was introduced at last year's Triple-I Initiativ...

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | Une entreprise québécoise devient un partenaire de Nvidia au Canada
item.description: L’entreprise québécoise Hypertec devient le premier partenaire désigné de Nvidia à pouvoir construire des usines d’intelligence artificielle (IA) au Canada.

item.title: Le bundle Motion Fly More DJI Neo en promo à -37% vole la vedette au DJI Neo 2 en étant bien plus abordable
item.description: Le DJI Neo est un mini-drone grand public avec un vrai système FPV qui est proposé ici à 333,77 euros au lieu de 529 euros en bundle Motion Fly More avec les Goggles N3, la RC Motion 3 et d'autres accessoires.

item.title: 1000xResist devs reveal their wild-looking second game about convincing an AI it's not human
item.description: Developer Sunset Visitor just revealed its follow-up to the fantastic 1000xResist. It's called Prove You're Human and looks to wade in similar sci-fi waters as the team's first title. Just like 10000xResist, the new game is a narrative adventure set in the far future. Prove You're Human tasks players with convincing an AI product that its not alive, but there's a rub. The protagonist is a digital clone of a person, so they aren't human either. This will no-doubt lead to all manner of ethical conundrums. "An AI dares to dream she is human," a tagline reads. "You've been hired to put her in her ...

item.title: ‘The Punisher: One Last Kill’ Trailer Promises Many Kills, Actually
item.description: Feast your eyes on the ferocious trailer for Jon Bernthal's Marvel TV special, directed by Reinaldo Marcus Green and co-written by Green and Bernthal.

item.title: Amazon's satellite internet service is scheduled for mid-2026 availability
item.description: Amazon Leo (formerly Project Kuiper) will launch mid-2026, according to Andy Jassy. On Wednesday, the Amazon CEO dropped the news in his annual letter to shareholders. The company says Leo will support download speeds up to 1 Gbps. By comparison, Starlink’s download speeds typically range between 45 and 280 Mbps.Jassy didn't specify whether the mid-2026 launch date will include consumer availability. (An Amazon spokesperson told Engadget that the company doesn’t have more detail to add right now.) We do know that "select enterprise customers" began testing the high-speed satellite service late...

item.title: The team behind 1000xResist is making a game about convincing an AI that it isn’t human
item.description: When the team at indie studio Sunset Visitor were wrapping up their critically acclaimed first game, 1000xResist, it wasn't long before they started thinking about what they'd tackle next. According to creative director Remy Siu, the studio's goal is to always find ways to reflect the world around them. So when they were looking at […]

item.title: Amazon bricking classic Kindles is a sign it learned nothing from Sonos' biggest mistake
item.description: Amazon is about to kill off almost a dozen Kindles, and it might be making the same mistake that tripped up Sonos for years.

item.title: Les fonds d’écran iPhone les plus impressionnants du moment viennent de l’espace !
item.description: Artemis II est une occasion incroyable pour obtenir des images encore jamais vues de la Lune. Les clichés réalisés par les astronautes sont tellement mémorables que certains passionnés les ont modifiés pour en faire des fonds d'écran parfaits pour les smartphones.

item.title: Could AMD's former foundry be quietly building up to become a major Arm — and AMD — rival?
item.description: Could AMD’s former foundry be assembling a RISC-V lineup to challenge Arm licensing?

item.title: Oil prices hit $100 and stocks slow over doubts on the US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: If oil prices stay high and keep upward pressure on inflation, the Federal Reserve would have difficulty resuming its interest rate cuts. Oil prices are climbing back toward $100 per barrel on Thursday, while stock markets worldwide slow following their big gains from the day before.

item.title: Test du Samsung Galaxy A37 : une évolution discrète et plus chère
item.description: Le Galaxy A37 est le plus accessible des smartphones de milieu de gamme chez Samsung. Une offre où l’équilibre reste la règle, avec l’ambition d’être un mobile rassurant et à la fois performant. Toutefois, cette année, on note un léger embonpoint du côté du prix, un détail qui peut coûter cher sur un segment aussi concurrentiel.

item.title: Russian censors target Google in VPN takedown push
item.description: As Russia doubles down against VPN usage, Google seems to be resisting removal requests so far, despite a popular app, ZoogVPN, having reportedly been removed from Google Play. Here's all we know.

item.title: Fin du tarif unique chez Ionity : ce qui change pour la recharge de votre voiture électrique
item.description: Ionity a modifié la grille tarifaire de ses bornes de recharge pour voitures électriques en France, au Royaume-Uni et en Allemagne en ce mois d'avril 2026. Désormais, le prix au kWh varie selon que la borne est située sur autoroute ou ailleurs. Les "anciens" clients ne sont pas concernés pour le moment.

item.title: Mastodon is about to launch its take on Bluesky’s starter packs
item.description: Mastodon is preparing to roll out "Collections" in the next few weeks, a feature that allows you to find and create lists of accounts worth following, according to an announcement on Thursday. Collections, which take inspiration from Bluesky Starter Packs, will come with the ability to add up to 25 accounts to a single list. […]

item.title: AI Gadgets Are Barely Trying Anymore
item.description: Button, an AI gadget from two ex-Apple employees, is giving a whole lot of nothing.

item.title: Meta's smart glasses are getting a major AI boost, but it doesn't address its biggest problem
item.description: Meta has said its new Muse Spark AI is coming to Meta glasses, and you should expect a big boost.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: Protect your WhatsApp messages beyond the username with this $40 lifetime VPN deal
item.description: WhatsApp might be improving its privacy options, but there's still more to be done.

item.title: As the iPod makes a comeback, here are some pointers to use it
item.description: iPod’s appeal is that it’s easy for hobbyists to tinker with them. Remember the iPod? It’s making a quiet comeback.

item.title: Did your Xbox controller recently ship without a battery included? Microsoft has finally acknowledged the issue and is compensating players with a 'one-time offer' — here's how you can claim yours
item.description: Xbox users who recently received a shipped Xbox wireless controller without a battery can now receive compensation by claiming a free Rechargeable Battery + USB‑C cable.

item.title: Slay the Princess’ developer is the latest to expand into indie game publishing
item.description: Black Tabby Games, the two-person studio behind the hit indie games Slay the Princess and Scarlet Hollow, is getting into indie publishing. The publishing arm, which was revealed on Thursday, is called Black Tabby Publishing and has already signed deals for two games: Prove You're Human, the next title from 1000xResist developer Sunset Visitor, and […]...

item.title: 'These new numbers are extremely concerning and I will say they’re unsustainable': Texas faces questions over giving data centers over $1 billion in tax breaks
item.description: Texas Senator calls data center tax incentives "unsustainable" – numerous states begin to question missing tax revenue.

item.title: La France annonce une étape cruciale vers sa sortie de Windows
item.description: La direction du numérique en France va basculer de Windows à Linux et l'État engage un grand chantier de réduction de la « dépendance numérique extra-européennes »

item.title: Avec son prochain Galaxy Unpacked, Samsung voudrait couper l’herbe sous le pied de l’iPhone pliant
item.description: Pour la première fois depuis des années, Samsung choisirait l'Europe pour dévoiler ses pliants.

item.title: 15 Major Pieces of Movie News That Might Break Next Week
item.description: CinemaCon is happening in Las Vegas from April 13-16, and here are some things we're hoping to learn.

item.title: The MacBook Neo is the best thing to happen to Windows in years
item.description: If there's one thing I know about Microsoft after covering the company for more than 20 years, it's that it will always respond to a competitive threat. Apple's MacBook Air convinced Microsoft and Intel to launch thin and light laptops with the Ultrabook initiative, the iPad pushed Microsoft to create its own tablet hardware, and […]

item.title: The U.S. and Silicon Valley may be running out of time to deal with Taiwan
item.description: Most advanced chips, including those for AI, are produced on the island, which China has long believed to be its own. Over four decades, I have had the opportunity to consult with almost all of the major companies in the PC, consumer electronics, and telecommunications industries. In 1991, when the PC industry was barely a decade old, Acer’s founder Stan Shih invited me to tour the company’s new PC factory in Taiwan. What I saw wasn’t just a factory–it was the foundation of a new world order in technology manufacturing. ...

item.title: Did Anthropic just soft-launch the scariest AI model yet?
item.description: The company’s Claude Mythos Preview model is remarkably good at harming or hijacking other systems. Anthropic’s first application of the model is in a defensive cybersecurity role. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here....

item.title: Malcolm in the Middle: Lifes Still Unfair review: I didnt know how much I needed this
item.description: Frankie Muniz, Bryan Cranston, and Jane Kaczmarek are back. Plus, many, many more.

item.title: The Bluetti Elite 300 is $1,200 off at Amazon ahead of RV season
item.description: The Bluetti Elite 300 is on sale at Amazon for $1,098.99, down from the list price at Bluetti of $2,299. That's a 52% discount.

item.title: Pourquoi le prix de la RAM et des SSD n’a pas fini d’exploser selon le fondateur de Dell
item.description: Si vous pensiez que le prix des composants s'était calmé, Michael Dell vient de doucher vos espoirs. Selon le patron du géant texan, l'intelligence artificielle s'apprête à dévorer la production mondiale de mémoire.

item.title: Guide d’achat 2026 : quel téléviseur Samsung choisir selon votre budget ?
item.description: Sur le marché des téléviseurs de 2026, Samsung est un acteur majeur, autant sur l'entrée que le haut de gamme. Nous les avons testés : bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs TV Samsung.

item.title: Avec’s Tinder-styled email app allows you to swipe through your inbox
item.description: Users can use the in-built voice transcription tool to reply to emails

item.title: Rhythm Heaven Groove comes to Switch on July 2
item.description: A large chunk of Nintendo’s 2026 plans remain a mystery (that is, unless you take the insiders and leakers at their word), but we have been waiting on release dates for a couple of previously announced first-party titles, including Rhythm Heaven Groove, which officially arrives July 2. Seemingly announced first on the Nintendo Today! app before making its way to the company’s various social channels, the first new entry in the Rhythm Heaven series in more than a decade is technically launching on the original Switch, but should also be fully playable on Switch 2. Currently the game’s Switch 2 ...

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5090 owner practices soldering skills on a $5,000 GPU — and the result is predictably disastrous
item.description: Want to practice your soldering skills? Don't do it on a $5,000 graphics card (in case you were tempted).

item.title: Home Depot's Spring Black Friday sale is better than I expected — here are the best deals on appliances, patio furniture, tools, and more
item.description: Home Depot just launched its Spring Black Friday sale, and it's better than I expected, including up to 40% off appliances, patio furniture, grills, and more.

item.title: I'm glad I had this powerful and silent fan ready to go for this week's unnaturally hot weather
item.description: I'm so glad I invested in this Shark FlexBreeze last year, as it came in extremely handy with this week's hot weather, and it's now on sale at Amazon.

item.title: Microsoft's baffling account ban blocks security patches for Windscribe, WireGuard VPN, VeraCrypt
item.description: Without the ability to sign kernel-level drivers, millions of people using these privacy tools could be left waiting for critical security fixes. Microsoft has now publicly acknowledged the issue, stating it is actively working to reinstate the accounts.

item.title: States are falling short on their clean energy goals due to data center boom
item.description: Nevada is one of the fastest-growing data center markets. Nevada’s largest utility says it will need three times the electricity required to power Las Vegas just to handle proposed data centers — and it probably can’t do that without fossil fuels.

item.title: Home Depots Spring Black Friday Sale is live: Heres what to expect and buy
item.description: Home Depot's Spring Black Friday sale officially kicks off this Thursday, April 9, and runs through April 22, 2026.

item.title: X brings back Voice Notes to X Chat
item.description: X Chat brings back Voice Notes to DMs and group chats after removing the option during the upgrade.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold is getting a restock April 10. How to get yours before its gone.
item.description: Samsung's TriFold phone has been in limited supply, but it's getting one (potentially final) restock on Friday, April 10.

item.title: Roku will stream Savannah Bananas games, along with the entire Banana Ball Championship League
item.description: The Banana Ball World Tour is coming to Roku. The platform has signed a deal to stream free content from the Banana Ball Championship League. This, of course, includes Savannah Bananas games. If that last paragraph didn't make a lick of sense to you, here's a primer. The Savannah Bananas are a wacky baseball team, playing something called Banana Ball. The team has been called the Harlem Globetrotters of baseball, and that's a fairly apt name. Players dress in funny costumes, step into ridiculously tall stilts, perform dance routines and do all kinds of things that could frustrate traditional b...

item.title: Le Pentagone développe un outil surprenant pour que ses soldats ne répètent plus les mêmes erreurs au combat
item.description: Le Pentagone a présenté pour la première fois Victor, un prototype d'assistant interne nourri par des données de missions réelles, conçu pour aider ses soldats à retrouver plus vite les informations utiles sur le terrain. Ce nouvel outil promet de réduire les erreurs répétées d’une brigade à l’autre et d’accélérer l’accès au savoir tactique déjà accumulé par l’institution....

item.title: A thin, light entry-level gaming laptop is $300 off at Best Buy
item.description: It’s tough to find decent gaming laptops under $1,000. However, Best Buy has what I consider to be a good entry-level model for 1080p gaming in Lenovo’s 15.6-inch LOQ laptop, which is selling for $649.99 (usually $959.99) through today, April 9th. Even with its Nvidia’s RTX 4050 (its lowest-tier GPU of the series), the laptop […]

item.title: Hacker stole £700,000 from U.K. energy company by redirecting payment
item.description: The U.K. energy company said a redirected payment meant for a contractor instead landed in a hacker's bank account.

item.title: With Artemis 2 Flying Home, NASA Is Already Teasing Artemis 3
item.description: The agency is already formulating the next Artemis mission, which will test integrated operations between the Orion spacecraft and one or both of NASA’s Moon landers.

item.title: The solution to America’s energy crisis starts with homes
item.description: Residential solar and battery storage systems can become flexible, distributed power plants that can respond to grid stress in minutes. When Winter storm Fern tore across the country in late January, more than a million Americans lost power. In Nashville, the utility recorded its highest outage total in history. In Louisiana, some families waited nearly two weeks for the lights to come back on. Officials issued emergency orders in several states as the storm exposed the fragility of our centralized energy system....

item.title: Now that's different - hackers use miniature SVG images to try and hide credit card stealer
item.description: Card skimmers were found in 1x1 pixel SVG images, apparently deployed through PolyShell.

item.title: "A future-proof powerhouse for demanding tasks": MSI's RTX5090 creative laptop gets a $300 price cut — Stealth A16 packs workstation-level power
item.description: MSI’s Stealth A16 pairs a Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 processor with 64GB of DDR5 and a 2TB NVMe SSD for demanding creative projects and heavy multitasking.

item.title: This overlooked tax detail could make today your real deadline
item.description: Experts warn that timing issues could trigger penalties for some filers. Tax day is right around the corner, but for some, the true deadline to complete returns is nearly a week earlier. That’s because if you’re planning to mail your tax returns to the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) instead of filing them electronically, they’ll need to be postmarked — not mailed — by April 15....

item.title: Laptops Are About to Get Very Exciting Again… Thanks to Nvidia
item.description: Nvidia is about to throw another wrench into laptops led by Intel, AMD, and Qualcomm.

item.title: Moins de 360 euros pour un moniteur OLED ? La meilleure technologie d’affichage sur PC est (enfin) abordable [Sponso]
item.description: L’OLED, c’est bien. Très bien même, surtout si l’on souhaite jouer dans les meilleures conditions possibles. Le problème, c’est qu’un bon moniteur OLED, c’est cher. Enfin presque, parce qu’en ce moment, PcComponentes vous file un coup de pouce pour (enfin) franchir le pas et oublier votre vieille dalle LCD.
